mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, b.author_name, b.created_at, b.views, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id) AS comment_count FROM vibe.board b ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.board (id, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views) VALUES (#{id}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.board SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
